summary: Comprehensive testing of new GTA RP Eyefind vehicle features: Vehicle Catalog (79 vehicles, 4 categories), Vehicle Orders with reduction validation (max 30%), DNA fabrication tracking, and permission checkbox fix verification. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend pages passed successfully.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test orders created during E2E testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All vehicle catalog and orders features working: 1) POST /api/vehicles/seed returns 'already seeded' with 79 vehicles, 2) GET /api/vehicles returns vehicles with id, name, category, price, 3) GET /api/vehicles/categories returns 4 categories: Commercial, Compacts, Coupes, Drift, 4) Vehicle CRUD operations work for patron role, 5) POST /api/vehicle-orders with vehicle_id, client info, reduction <=30% creates order with calculated final_price, 6) Reduction >30% returns 400 error, 7) PUT /api/vehicle-orders/{id}/advancement updates status with dna_comment param, 8) PUT /api/vehicle-orders/{id}/call toggles client_called boolean, 9) Admin cannot create orders (403), 10) Frontend sidebar shows 'Commandes véhicules', 'Suivi DNA', 'Catalogue véhicules' links for patron, 11) EmployeesPage permission checkboxes work without crash (div+Check icon instead of Radix Checkbox)

details: POST /api/vehicles/seed returns message 'Catalogue déjà rempli (79 véhicules)'
GET /api/vehicles returns all 79 vehicles with id, name, category, price, created_at
No auth required for reading catalog
GET /api/vehicles/categories returns Commercial, Compacts, Coupes, Drift
POST /api/vehicles creates new vehicle (patron/admin)
PUT /api/vehicles/{id} updates vehicle price
DELETE /api/vehicles/{id} removes vehicle
POST /api/vehicle-orders creates order with all required fields
Final price calculated: base - (base * reduction_percent/100) - reduction_exceptional
Reduction >30% returns 400 Bad Request
Exactly 30% reduction succeeds
Admin cannot create orders (403)
PUT /api/vehicle-orders/{id}/advancement?advancement=fabrication updates status
All statuses work: en_attente, fabrication, receptionne, livre
DNA comment saved via dna_comment query param
PUT /api/vehicle-orders/{id}/call toggles client_called boolean
Patron sidebar shows: Commandes véhicules, Suivi DNA, Catalogue véhicules
Links navigate to correct pages
Page shows '79 véhicules · 4 catégories'
Vehicles grouped by category with price display
Add, Edit, Delete buttons functional
Search and category filter work
Spreadsheet-like table with all columns: Personnel, Client, Tél, Modèle, Entreprise, Date, Réduction, Prix vente, Appel, Plaque, Avancement, DNA, Commentaire, Actions
Create dialog with category filter and vehicle select
Price calculation displayed in real-time
Status badges with appropriate colors
Shows stats: Total, En attente, Fabrication, Réceptionné, Livré
Order cards clickable to update status
DNA comment input available
EmployeesPage loads without blank page bug
Permission toggles use div+Check icon (not Radix Checkbox)
No infinite setState loop when clicking permissions
